name: expense-tracker
description: Full-stack expense tracker with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB — featuring real-time financial summaries, RBAC, and optimised aggregation pipelines

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"

author: Anuhya Parlapalli
